summary: Good 1977 jam‑heavy show with nice Keith piano touches; recording quality not detailed.
review: The reviewer rates the performance a solid four stars, highlighting the jammy feel of the set and pleasant piano tinkling from Keith. No comments are made about the audio source or sound fidelity, so the technical side remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review; positive remarks about the show (≈4) but no recording details (assumed neutral ≈3). Weighted average yields ~3.7.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer did not mention any audio issues or source type; quality assumed acceptable but unspecified.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Jam‑heavy, typical 1977 vibe with extended improvisations.

band_member_comments.Keys: Nice piano tinkling from Keith noted.
